category_sources: source_facts.description: bridge between Node projects and package managers; official nodejs/corepack README says Corepack manages Yarn, npm, and pnpm versions for Node.js projects
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is corepack; official GitHub repository title is nodejs/corepack at https://github.com/nodejs/corepack
docs_sources: Official nodejs/corepack README contains installation, usage, commands, environment variables, and troubleshooting documentation
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://github.com/nodejs/corepack; official GitHub repository describes Corepack as the Node.js package-manager bridge
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Node projects and package managers; official README describes Yarn, npm, and pnpm workflow support
